title: 设置 cache_control 启用 prompt caching
title_en: Set cache_control Breakpoints for Prompt Caching

body.goal: 在 API 请求中启用 prompt caching，让重复前缀被自动缓存复用。
steps: 方式一（自动缓存）：在请求顶层加 "cache_control": {"type": "ephemeral"}。系统自动将缓存断点放在最后一个可缓存的 block 上，适合多轮对话。
方式二（显式断点）：在具体的 content block 上加 "cache_control": {"type": "ephemeral"}，精确控制哪些内容被缓存。适合需要细粒度控制的场景。
确保缓存前缀满足最小长度要求（不同模型不同，通常 1024 tokens 起）。
检查响应中的 usage 字段：cache_creation_input_tokens 表示首次写入缓存的 token 数，cache_read_input_tokens 表示命中缓存的 token 数。

body_en.goal: Enable prompt caching in API requests so repeated prefixes are cached and reused.
steps: Option 1 (automatic): Add "cache_control": {"type": "ephemeral"} at the top level of your request. The system places the cache breakpoint on the last cacheable block automatically. Best for multi-turn conversations.
Option 2 (explicit): Add "cache_control": {"type": "ephemeral"} on specific content blocks for fine-grained control over what gets cached.
Ensure the cached prefix meets the minimum length requirement (varies by model, typically starting at 1024 tokens).
Check the usage field in the response: cache_creation_input_tokens shows tokens written to cache; cache_read_input_tokens shows tokens served from cache.
